case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, NA VS. RAEANN LIMUN

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200021734), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, NA SERVED DEC-15-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIMUN, RAEANN

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, NA AS TO DEFENDANT LIMUN, RAEANN NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-21-2021
